ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workforce_diversity" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of diversity data */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Description of the measure being recorded */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the staff member */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* Type of ethnicity classification */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time period relevant to the data */,
  "type_of_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "entry_level" TEXT /* Entry-level status */,
  "broad_grade" TEXT /* Broad grade category */,
  "specific_grade" TEXT /* Specific grade category */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Count of staff in the specified ethnicity */,
  "denominator" REAL /* Total number of staff for denominator */,
  "value" REAL /* Percentage value of the specific measure */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., %) */,
  "trust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NHS trust or CCG */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the trust or CCG */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the staff member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the staff member */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title of the staff member */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "work_hours" TEXT /* Work hours (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member left (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_broad_grade FOREIGN KEY ("broad_grade") REFERENCES grades ("broad_grade"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_time FOREIGN KEY ("time") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_entry_level FOREIGN KEY ("entry_level") REFERENCES entry_levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_value_type FOREIGN KEY ("value_type") REFERENCES value_types ("value_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_type_of_role FOREIGN KEY ("type_of_role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_diversity_specific_grade FOREIGN KEY ("specific_grade") REFERENCES grades ("specific_grade")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of ethnicity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ethnicity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ethnicity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of roles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entry_levels" (
  "entry_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the entry level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entry level */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of entry levels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "broad_grade" TEXT /* Broad category of the grade */,
  "specific_grade" TEXT /* Specific category of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of grades */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of time periods */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_types" (
  "value_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value type */,
  "value_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the value type (e.g., %) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of value types */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headcount_totals" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each headcount record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the headcount category */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of staff members */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the organization (e.g., NHS trust, CCG) */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the headcount total was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the headcount total was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Historical, Demographic) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
